title: Approved driving instructor (ADI) qualifying test data
body: "ADI part 1 (theory) test data  Great Britain  These data tables are updated quarterly. They were last updated on 4 December 2025 with data to September 2025.     Table reference File name     DRT511A  ADI part 1 tests conducted, passed and pass rates by financial quarter and financial year: Great Britain  (ODS, 12.3 KB)   DRT511B  ADI part 1 tests conducted, passed and pass rates by month, financial quarter and year, gender: Great Britain  (ODS, 47.9 KB)     By test centre  The Driver and Vehicle Standards Agency (DVSA) is aiming to publish annual data about ADI part 1 tests by test centre for the first time in June 2026. This will contain data from April 2025 to March 2026.     Table reference File name     DRT512A Not currently available     ADI part 2 (driving ability) test data  Great Britain  These data tables are updated quarterly. They were last updated on 4 December 2025 with data to September 2025.     Table reference File name     DRT521A  ADI part 2 tests conducted, passed and pass rates by financial quarter and financial year: Great Britain  (ODS, 12.5 KB)   DRT521B  ADI part 2 tests conducted, passed and pass rates by month, financial quarter and year, gender: Great Britain  (ODS, 48.1 KB)     By test centre  This data table is updated annually. It was last updated on 14 August 2025 with data to March 2025.     Table reference File name     DRT522A  ADI part 2 (driving ability) test pass rate by gender: test centres  (ODS, 182 KB)     ADI part 3 (instructional ability) test data  Great Britain  These data tables are updated quarterly. They were last updated on 4 December 2025 with data to September 2025.     Table reference File name     DRT521C  ADI part 3 tests conducted, passed and pass rates by financial quarter and financial year: Great Britain  (ODS, 12.5 KB)   DRT521D  ADI part 3 tests conducted, passed and pass rates by month, financial quarter and year, gender: Great Britain  (ODS, 47.1 KB)     By test centre  This data table is updated annually. It was last updated on 14 August 2025 with data to March 2025.     Table reference File name     DRT522B  ADI part 3 (instructional ability) test pass rate by gender: test centres  (ODS, 200 KB)     Changes to how this data is published  This data is now all published by DVSA. Before 2025, data for Great Britain overall was published by the Department for Transport (DfT).  You can view archived versions of the data as it was published by DfT in the National Archives.  View data in the National Archives.  Data you cannot find  Data you cannot find might have been published as a response to an Freedom of Information (FOI) request.  Send an FOI request to DVSA if you still cannot find the information you need.  By law, DVSA cannot send you information that’s part of an official statistic that has not yet been published.   Freedom of Information requests   Freedom of Information RequestsDVSA, 1 Unity SquareNottinghamNG2 1AY      Contact form https://www.smartsurve...        Help with the data  The driving test, theory test and driving instructor statistics information gives details about the data sources and how the tests work.  Contact DVSA to get...

taxons.title: Driving, motorcycle and LGV instructor qualification process
